subcodes.first_line: O God! Suffer these wanderers around thy abode to become they passionate lovers, freed from the known and the unknown. Verily Thou art the Powerful and the Mighty.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خداوند این گمکشتگان کوی خویش را عاشقان فارغ از بیگانه و خویش فرما توای
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prayer for nearness to God
